entry.title: Re: CDS View for Planned cost and revenue.
entry.content:
Hello SAP member,
 
The CDS view I_ENGMNTPROJTMEEXPNBILLGCUBE provides a way to access the Time and Expense Cap in the Engagement Project. This contains both Planned Cost and Actual Cost. Please check.
 
Technical Fields: PLNDCOSTAMT &
                            ACTLCOSTAMT
 
Thanks.
Regards,
Sravankumar Nendrambaka

entry.title: Re: From Tradition to Innovation: Upgrading to MRP Live
entry.content: Great summary of transition Classic to MRP Live for organisations sticking with core ERP/without strong sponsor or business case to implement IBP. Good to see SAP investing in standard functionality.

entry.title: Change Printer in RF EWM Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

It looks like currently in SAP Public Cloud 2408, the only way to assign a user to a new printer is through OPD. This poses issues as many clients want to be able to change their printer assignment in a mobile transaction. 

Additionally, there are no API's released that allow the change the assignment of a print queue to printer.  Meaning, we cannot develop our own application. 

In EWM 2023 FPS01, there has a been a release to allow the change of a printer (see link below) in RF. By going to Resource Management, a new field of '03 Printer' has been added.

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-extended-warehouse-management-in-sap-s-4hana-2023-fps01-private-cloud/ba-p/13620717

Unfortunately, it seems in Public Cloud there is no available option for this.  In OPD, we can assign a resource to a user's print queue. This print queue can then be assigned to a specific printer. Linking a resource to a mobile printer. However, we would also like to utilize the ability of assigning warehouse orders to pickers (resources) and not the resource itself. In addition, there is no ability to add resource group as a context data object in OPD.

 

So simply, my question is. Is there any other way of doing this?

entry.title: Re: Correct way to provision the destination for calling...

Hello,

The error looks like the CAP application fails to connect to the destination. Can we check if the destination service is bound to the CAP application. Here is a sample application with steps to replicate the usecase which includes steps to configure the destination and bind it to the CAP application : https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-llm-plugin-samples/tree/main/samples/rag-quickstart-app

Happy to assist further if the issue persists.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone 2H 2024 Release Highlights: Enhancing Employee Experiences
entry.content:
The recent updates to SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone are making it easier and more flexible for organizations to manage employees, onboard new hires, and boost engagement. With an emphasis on low-code and no-code tools, improved self-service options, and a seamless experience, Work Zone now brings forth exciting features that resonate with the changing demands of the workplace. Let’s take a moment to explore some of the standout features from the 2H 2024 release:

Low-Code/No-Code Guided Experiences

We are excited to introduce our new guided experience capabilities, which offers simple low-code and no-code configuration options. This makes it easy for organizations to manage and personalize their onboarding and cross-boarding journeys. This new approach makes it easier to set up and personalize onboarding workflows, so you do not have to worry about complicated coding using the Wizard framework.

It allows companies to tailor onboarding and cross-boarding experiences to meet their specific needs, ensuring that new hires and employees in transition can quickly and confidently become productive members of the team. Moreover, users can take individual screens from each step of the guided experience and turn them into adaptable workspace content, which adds even more flexibility.

New SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Quick Actions

SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone now includes four new SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central quick actions, empowering managers with more efficient self-service capabilities. Accessible directly from the "My Team" card, managers can easily initiate and end team suspensions or furloughs, ensuring a smoother process for employees as they reenter the workforce.

These quick actions provide managers with a straightforward, self-service approach to key personnel actions, saving time and enhancing team management within the platform.

SuccessFactors Home Page Cards in Work Zone

In a move to bring more insights directly into SuccessFactors Work Zone, employees can now access SuccessFactors Home Page cards within the platform. These engagement cards deliver the same real-time insights and information as on the SuccessFactors Home Page, including learning assignments, pending tasks, onboarding checklists, and bonus details—all accessible without leaving the SuccessFactors Work Zone.

This integration not only improves employee access to essential information but also keeps them informed and engaged within a single, unified workspace.

The 2H 2024 release of SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone introduces features that place usability and flexibility at the forefront, empowering employees, and managers to manage essential tasks with ease. By enabling customizable onboarding experiences, streamlining self-service quick actions, and integrating home Page insights, SuccessFactors Work Zone reinforces SAP’s commitment to delivering a seamless, productive, and engaging workplace experience.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud - The source of delivery address in Purchase order form determination
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm using the data source FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER_SRV for the Purchase Order form.

There is Ship to party address node under PurchaseOrderNode. I need to know what the source of ShipToParty node is.

Is it the delivery address under PO line item?

What happens if there are multiple PO line items with different delivery addresses?

Thanks

Tri

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Architecture for integration?
entry.content:
Hi @arkesh_sharma,

Thank you for your comments.

When I say "one level higher in the abstraction" - I refer going toward "high level" Architecture... In SBBs we would do low level (or detail) design. While ABB is more "abstract" high level Architecture. 

Lets say APIM (I am working a log on it lately)... If I say Apigee or BTP APIM or Azure APIM and do detail design of policies, cashing etc. - I would say this is detail Solution Design or Solution Architecture (probably part of the wider Solution Architecture). But if I talk about various capabilities of APIM in the context of the i.e. Integration Strategy - than APIM can be ABB.

I do not use vendor's product category - after all different vendors will organize its product portfolio in different ways. I talk about:

  • if the context is about capabilities and/or business/technical requirements, and if it can be (not necessarily it must be) vendor agnostic - then this will be "high level" Architecture of the ABB
  • but if we go to particular solutioning, i.e. not some generic integration flow but very specific design of iFlow with JMS queue because of retry requirements etc. - than CPI iFlows with JMS may be seen as a SBB. Of course, you might have built this retry with Datastore - this is part of the solutioning - not relevant for ABB. 

Sort of rule of thumb - but no general rule...

entry.title: Re: Round off Values in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: Hello Frazer, Thank you so much. It worked!

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 構築手順に関する質問

先日のご回答に続き、今回もご丁寧なご回答をいただき、誠にありがとうございます。
重ねて御礼申し上げます。

entry.title: Re: Round off Values in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: No problem. Please mark your question as answered/completed.

entry.title: Re: Correct way to provision the destination for calling...
entry.content:
Thanks Akash, thank you for the repo - that was exactly the repo I was using to construct my `package.json` file. I updated the original post with the steps to bind my CAP project in hybrid mode. Somehow, there is some type of misconfig. Have you seen this error before?

 

 

statusCode: 502,

reason: {

message: 'Error during request to remote service: Failed to build headers. Caused by: The destination tried to provide authorization tokens but failed in all cases. This is most likely due to misconfiguration.\n' +

'Original error messages:\n' +

'Could not verify the provided CSRF token because no token was found to compare.',

entry.title: Re: Delete more than one line at once on a sales order
entry.content: It’s not possible to delete multiple rows at once in a sales document using the standard SBO client. In fact, selecting multiple rows in a sales document is not supported.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Common Functions Disappearing
entry.content: One of my clients shared a similar issue with me. When they try to click on the shortcuts, sometimes the shortcut gets dragged out of the common function area, causing the menu to disappear. I searched through SAP notes and blogs but couldn't find any relevant solutions.

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Architecture for integration?
entry.content:
Thank you @AndreasPoth, yes of course it resonates.

I do mostly SAFe nowadays (TOGAF in past) - but I do follow SAP EA framework ever since it started emerging with AppHaus (if I am right it started shaping itself with Lean EA approach...). And Lean EA (again my view) made the great distinction from TOGAF style frameworks - due to its "pragmatic" approach...

Needless to say more, I still take quite a few "ideas" from Lean EA... I am not "strong" follower "to the letter" of any framework - to be honest... Somehow I always try to take the best of all...

entry.title: Re: RAP: Abstract Behavior Definition, Dynamical visibility
entry.content:

Thanks-

entry.title: Re: Customize E-Mail notification (Enable Now)
entry.content:
Hi there,

I think that you are indicating that you are using the Administration > Messages function in Manager to send emails to people that need to undertake training.  The content that you add to the body of your message can include HTML tags so your messages can be formatted to look as beautiful as your HTML skills allow.  I would stick to standard HTML tags that comply with the HTML 5 standard but that offers a tonne of options to format your message.

Hope that helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: How to get the error details in SAP CPI when calling via HTTPS?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

This is what I am trying to do.

I will call HTTPS from Postman, and the integration flow itself will show failure, which is my intention.

At the point when I call from Postman, the body of message only shows "An internal server error occured: The MPL ID of the failed message is : ......." and returned 500 internal server error as error code.

However, what I expect is that after calling from Postman, the body of message can show the details of error, just like what can be observed in SAP CPI. 

Plus, I hope that I can change the error code as well. Now it is 500 but is it possible to change it?

I am aware that this should be done by some groovy script. Does anyone know how to achieve this?

 

Thank you.

Please keep up with these blog posts - they are really AWESOME!  😉

entry.title: How to Change the Rounding Residual Threshold (0.0005) for Quantity Field
entry.content:
Currently it already round up from 0.0005 to 0.0009 = 0.001. We want all amount with more than 4 decimal point issues also round up to 0.001. This affects rounding residuals and cause inconsistencies. Once this is solved user will not see error message "Qty must be larger than 0" struck in MES/COGI. 

Current Logic Example     

0.0005 = 0.001

0.0004 = 0 (SAP Converts to zero)

We need Logic   

0.0005 = 0.001

0.0004 = 0.001 (Do not convert to zero)

Should i create custom function?

Note that we cannot implement OSS and Define Rounding Profiles in SPRO because it will affect all MM and PP modules. We only need to implement on one field and one interface.

entry.title: SAP 分析云 2024 年第四季度更新介绍
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能（BI）、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

本文介绍 SAP 分析云 2024 年第四季度的季度发布 (QRC) 的新功能和增强功能列表。

在 的视频 中，SAP 产品专家将向您展示 2024 年第四季度的部分重点功能。

 

 

系统与服务管理 

  • 通过跨域身份管理系统 (SCIM) API 激活和停用用户
  • SAP Analytics Cloud系统概览性能单页

分析目录

  • 分析目录资产分组

数据分析器

  • 一次性显示或隐藏“总计”选项
  • 为表中的度量添加单元格内统计图
  • 新增表格样式设置选项
  • 新的统计图类型

企业计划

  • 在建模器中创建和删除版本
  • 数据操作－跨模型复制中灵活映射维度
  • 数据操作 –  
  • 数据操作 - 单位转换支持
  • 计划输入 – 允许账户和度量聚合类型为“NONE”的节点的输入
  • 计划流程管理 - 使用日历向导定义角色时直接选择用户或团队
  • 计划流程管理 – 日历模板支持

Microsoft Office 集成

  • 新增激活或停用“暂停刷新”功能的选项
  • 支持在Microsoft Excel中重命名表
  • Microsoft Excel中支持计划范围，包括动态扩展
  • 新增覆盖公式以在Microsoft Excel表中创建非对称筛选
  • 支持Microsoft PowerPoint 桌面版
  • 在编辑弹出窗口中添加微件
  • 覆盖 Microsoft PowerPoint 中的微件

故事设计

  • 提前加载会影响统计图度量数级和轴对齐的不可见的统计图
  • 经典故事批量迁移至优化故事体验
  • 调整微件内部的条形宽度

故事可扩展性

  • 设计组合时支持自定义CSS样式
  • 支持将组合保存在故事模板中
  • 应用主题时，可选择覆盖所有现有的微件样式
  • 提供脚本 API 以切换图表上的 BEx 条件
  • 保存书签时，可选择包含或排除故事筛选器和计算
  • 新增一个用于启用/禁用按钮的 API 脚本

用户协作

  • 计划发布故事时支持 Excel 格式
  • 新增一个用于共建故事计划发布的公共 API

本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和改进功能的高级概述。您可以在针对FastTrack客户的应用内帮助指南中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息，如果您想了解更多关于FastTrack和季度发布周期发布的信息，请参阅这篇SAP 知识库文章。

如果您对本博文的内容有任何疑问，可以在下方发表评论。如果您有具体的产品或技术问题，请在我们的中文 SAP Analytics Cloud 问答论坛上提问。访问我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 社区页面，了解更多产品信息、卓越实践等。查看我们的 SAP 路线图浏览器，了解 SAP 分析云即将推出的更多功能。

entry.title: Re: How to Retrigger Output Parameter Determination Autom...

entry.title: In health monitoring, the data collection status displays as Red status during the Maintenance
entry.content:
The system/service has planned to be restarted and a maintenance event has been created in the Event Calender in Business Service Management for the service/system.

However, the data collection status in the Health Monitoring still displays as "red status" with the message "The service/system did not send data within the last 2 hours." during the maintenance period


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: In health monitoring, the data collection status disp...
entry.content:
This is an expected behavior as documented in the following user guide.
Only the event action will be suspended during the maintenance and disruptions. 
The data collection status will still be updated in the Health Monitoring

  • https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/business-service-management.html

    Integration with SAP Cloud ALM Monitoring 

    Business Service Management forwards upcoming and ongoing cloud service or system status events (disruption, degradation, maintenance) to the SAP Cloud ALM monitoring applications.  The SAP Cloud ALM monitoring applications visualize the current status of the cloud service. They react as follows to ongoing status events: 

    • Health Monitoring will suppress event actions (create alert, send mail, create ticket, start operation flow) during maintenances and disruptions.

entry.title: Crystal Reports Layout Questions
entry.content:
I would like to know if the following is possible in Crystal Reports.

What I would like to do is to output the excess characters on the next page only if the specified number of characters for an item on a certain page is exceeded.

Specifically, the number of characters for a certain item on the first page of a report is set to 100.

If 200 characters of data are received, I would like the excess 100 characters to be output on the second page. Furthermore, if the number is under 100 characters, I would like the second page not to be printed.

If anyone knows, I would be very grateful if you could let me know.

Please let me know what is the missing in my configuration .

Thanks In Advance

entry.title: Extracting Data from CSV Files in SAP Cloud Application Studio
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

This blog post will explain how to read/extract a value from a CSV file and upload it into a business object.

Design:

In this example, I have used the custom business object (standard business object will also work) with a node named Item and Attachment Folder dependent object.

 

node Items [0, n]
{
	[AlternativeKey] [Label("Item ID")] element ItemID : ID;
	[Label("Product ID")] element ProductID : ProductInternalID;
	[Label("Quantity")] element Quantity : Quantity;
	[Label("Price")] element Price : Amount;
	association ToProduct to material;
}
[DependentObject(AttachmentFolder)] node Attachment;

 

Screenshot of the CSV file prepared for my upload testing.

I want to perform a data extraction from CSV when an attachment is uploaded and when the user clicks an upload button (custom button). So, a custom action was created with the below logic and bound to the upload button in the UI designer.

 

import ABSL;
import AP.PlatinumEngineering;

if (this.Attachment.IsSet())
{
  if (this.Attachment.Document.Count() != 0)
  {
    var get_first = this.Attachment.Document.GetFirst();
    if (get_first.IsSet())
    {
      var binary = get_first.FileContent.BinaryObject.content; //to get the binary content of csv file
      var to_str = binary.ToString(); //convert the binary content to String
      var xpes_tab: XPEStringTab;
      var all_rows = CSV.Parse(to_str, ",", xpes_tab); //use CSV reuse library to parse each row values from the String
      foreach(var row in all_rows.CSVStringTab)
      {
        var item = this.Items.Create(); //you can also perform CreateMass()
        item.ItemID = row.XPEString.GetByIndex(1); //index will start from 1
        item.ProductID = row.XPEString.GetByIndex(2);
        item.Price.content = row.XPEString.GetByIndex(3);
        item.Price.currencyCode = row.XPEString.GetByIndex(4);
        item.Quantity.content = row.XPEString.GetByIndex(5);
        item.Quantity.unitCode = row.XPEString.GetByIndex(6);
      }
    }
  }
}

 

In the script, I have used the data type XPEStringTab and the CSV library with the Parse function. You can access this data type and library only if you import the PlatinumEngineering namespace.

Important: If we raise any case to SAP support saying the library from PlatinumEngineering is not working, they will not support. Because it is not released for general use like other reuse libraries (Binary, Context, Date, DateTime, Duration, String, etc.).

KBA: 2698916 - Facing Issues while Using SAP Platinum Engineering Libraries - SAP for Me

Blogs: SAP Platinum Engineering Libraries - SAP Community

Let's get back to our design: We have a BO and action script ready already. Bind the action to a button in UI designer. Below is a screenshot for reference.

Testing:

Once all the above steps are completed, upload the CSV to the attachment folder and click on the custom action button. It will parse the csv data and add the values into the item node.

Attachment Folder:

Item Node:

Upload button in the Item node advance list pane will call the custom action which will parse the data.

Notes:

  1. You can read only the binary value of a CSV file and convert it into a string. Not Excel or other format files.
  2. Without using the Platinum Engineering Library also, you can achieve this extract. But then building that parsing logic will be very hard and not understandable easily.

Conclusion:

In my experience, I have never faced any issues with some of the Platinum Engineering libraries like Mail, UserUtils, CurrencyConversion, and TextAnalysis.

It will be very helpful if SAP releases this CSV parsing library official like we have for JSON parsing.

My Other Blogs:

    • Enhancing Form of Standard Business Objects
    • Intelligent Sales Execution in SAP Cloud for Customer
    • Adding Local Image to C4C Workflow E-mail Template
    • Rules and Validations in SAP C4C - SAP Community

Regards,

Abimanyu G

entry.title: Use business documents with general journal templates
entry.content:
Most financial transactions are posted to the general ledger through dedicated business documents, such as purchase invoices and sales orders. Depending the regulations for a specific country or region, these documents can also be set up to use journals when posting to the general ledger.

On the General Ledger Setup page, the Journal Templ. Name Mandatory field can be selected to require the use of general journals throughout Business Central.

Once selected, default general journal templates and default general journal batches must be set up on the respective setup pages for the different business areas. Once done, these setup pages have a Journal Templates FastTab visible:

  • General Ledger Setup

  • Sales & Receivables Setup

  • Purchases & Payables Setup

  • Inventory Setup

  • Service Management Setup

itil traning courses malaysia

entry.title: Manage Service Contract
entry.content:
Hi expert!

Is it possible to change the CDSView in the SAP Public Cloud App "Manage Service Contract" to change the list display?

The requirement is to display the Service Contract Item in the App "Manage Service Contract".
In this case, would it be better to create it using a custom CDSView?

Soma

entry.title: End-to-end process of migrating data
entry.content:
You manage cloud migration from Business Central online. But the on-premises solution remains the operative environment until you complete the migration. Don't set up cloud migration for a production environment that is already in use for business. As stated before, you risk that the migration process will overwrite data that is needed to run that business.

Any existing data in Business Central online will be overwritten with data from your on-premises solution, or source, once the data migration process is run. If you don't want data in Business Central online to be overwritten, don't configure the connection. The only exception is when you migrate from Business Central on-premises using the current version, because you can run the migration tool multiple times in that very specific scenario.

If your data source is Business Central on-premises, several stored procedures will be added to the SQL Server instance that you define. These stored procedures are required to migrate data from your SQL Server database to the Azure SQL server associated with your Business Central tenant.

The main steps in a migration process are:

  1. Have a target environment with a paid subscription.

  2. Determine which data to migrate.

    • For Business Central on-premises, determine which companies to migrate and the number of migration runs to use to migrate the required data.

    • For Dynamics GP, you can use the migration process to move historical data to Azure Data Lake.

    • For Dynamics NAV, upgrade to Business Central on-premises first, and then migrate.

  3. Migrate data, using the Cloud Migration Setup assisted setup wizard available in Business Central online.

  4. Test the result of the migration.

  5. Set up users, permissions, and other configurations in Business Central online.

  6. Stop using the on-premises solution, switch off the migration, and tell users to start using Business Central online for daily business.

kubernetes containarization training courses malaysia

entry.title: Re: Not getting Predective Consumtion % and Predictive ex...
entry.content:
@manish_gangwal wrote:

I am executing Machine learning scenario 1QR . I have followed all the step mentioned in the SAP best practice document.

After executing Fiori app Contract Quantity Consumption out put is displaying but i am not getting some fields value example are Predictive Consumption % , Expected Predictive date etc.

Please let me know what is the missing in my configuration .

Thanks In Advance

 

 

 

 

Hello,
It sounds like you've followed the SAP best practice document steps correctly. The missing fields, such as Predictive Consumption % and Expected Predictive Date, might be due to incomplete configuration or missing data sources. redhumana

Check the following:

  1. Configuration Settings: Ensure all necessary fields are enabled in the Fiori app settings.

  2. Data Sources: Verify that the required data sources are correctly linked and populated.

  3. User Roles: Confirm that your user role has the necessary permissions to view these fields.

If these steps don't resolve the issue, consulting SAP support or your system administrator might be helpful.

Best Regards,
Julie Doyle

entry.title: Ensure your success
entry.content:
Modules from the Learn the fundamentals of Dynamics 365 projects learning path (and others in the Business Applications Professional series), offer a wide range of new information to help you become a better functional consultant. The modules include written lessons, video interviews with people who work as Business Applications professionals, video interviews with industry leaders, assignments, knowledge checks, and other suggested learning opportunities.

Many assignments directly relate to Dynamics 365. However, several assignments will attempt to help shift your thinking into the mindset of a consultant. For example, the assignments might show you extra learning opportunities, or they might provide exercises that switch the focus of your daily activities to the business side of the activity. A functional consultant needs to be an analytical thinker. Additionally, they need the ability to apply that thought process to the business and the technology solutions for the business.

android training courses malaysia

We checked the BAdI and found that Product group is available But unfortunately, we DIDNT FOUND VALUATION CLASS in changing parameters of BAdI. Business Requirement is to read Product group & based on that, Control valuation Class.

entry.title: Re: How to display 3 years data in Story based on User da...
entry.content: If you just want to select year,  and always display 3 years of data , you only have to expose the current year Select.

entry.title: Re: How to provide default date with cap actions
entry.content:
Hi @syedimran ,

If it is feasible, you can provide default values on the implementation of the action when you call it with null values.

Remove the mandatory annotation from the parameters:

    action updateInvoices(InitialDate : Date @Common.Label:'Start Date',
                          FinalDate : Date @Common.Label:'End Date' );

Add default date calculation to the implementation of your action:

  srv.on('updateInvoices', async (req) => {
    if (req.data.InitialDate === null) {
      // do the calculation of the first day of the month
    }
    if (req.data.FinalDate === null) {
      // do the calculation of the last day of the month
    }
  });

Call you action:

/updateInvoices(InitialDate=null,FinalDate=null)

OData v4 itself doesn't seem to support default values for action parameters and it would be difficult to declare relative date calculations there.

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: A list of which component accepts an expert chat / shedule an expert

entry.title: Re: SLD Data Supplier to to SAP's Support Backbone, for S...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

It's supported to register HANA via a proxy server. Please see Note 2729787 -> 8. How can I register an SAP HANA database via a proxy server? Router is not supported to register HANA. 

It's supported to register ABAP via a router. Note 2855951 states the following info:
As of June 2021, also SAProuter is supported. To enable SAProuter, the network administrator will provide you with the appropriate route string to access the service, like /H/<saprouter@customer>/S/3299/H/<saprouter@sap>/S/3299/H/supply.landscape.services.sap for Target System Settings Host.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Multiple HANA index server service for load balancing
entry.content:
Hi Rameshyadav,


To achieve load balance, it is recommended to build your HANA system as scale-out system as per "Multiple-Host (Distributed) Systems"

If you just have one HANA server (node), it is not recommended to add multiple indexserver services for one tenant DB, even though technically it is possible.


Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: S_ALR_87013326 - Account not included
entry.content:
Hi @carvalhomarcelo 

Please check if you see the postings in FAGLFLEXA for this GL Account? What is the nature of this GL Account? Also do you have Classical PCA update still in your system? Also it would help if you could specify the nature of GL Account.

Thanks & Best Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Regarding to In-app extensibility
entry.content:
Dear All.

I want to know about In-app extensibility.

Is it possible to add a new item?
Is it possible to perform input check processing using the newly created items?
When defining F1Help for an item, is it possible to change the content of the output depending on the values of other items (profit centers, etc.)?
Can we then create a table (or CDSView) for the newly created items?
Also, is it possible to express a hierarchy on the table?

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: Re: creation of a Fiori-All role
entry.content:
I found only one way to do this. 

PFCG/role/menu/From Menus/From another Role/Local/choose SAP_BR_*/select some role/select all Fiori elements

It will put all Fiori elements from SAP_BR_ role into your role. To have SAP_FIORI_ALL need to repeat action for about 100-200 roles. Looks doable.

entry.title: Re: Mass action in compensation is not working as expected
entry.content: I did a few more tests and the amount that we enter is considered annual and hence it is divided by the units per year and then applied during Mass action, is this expected? When I run it on Annual Salary, it is working correctly.

entry.title: Re: SOLMAN 7.2 software required for new installation
entry.content:
Hi Maladri,

The planning a new system installation page states the detailed steps required:

  1. Plan a system change in maintenance planner.
  2. Download the Stack XML and its corresponding stack.
  3. Download the initial installation archives from SAP Support Portal  Software Downloads.
  4. Install a new system using Software Provisioning Manager.
  5. Update the system using Software Update Manager.

Following exactly the steps and the initial installation archives will be included in the generated pdf files in maintenance planner. Simply clicking on the file names could download them. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: how to deal with extension of BAPI BAPI_RESERVATION_CHANGE
entry.content: hey guys, i still can't find the exit enhancement for the bapi 'BAPI_RESERVATION_CHANGE', who can give me some suggestions to deal with the extension for updating the Z_field in RESB table .

entry.title: Re: Report for PR - PO link
entry.content:
hello,

this is a 2 step process for PO-> PR  Mapping 

step 1 

Go to se16n  T-CODE  then write a table name EKPO (Line Item) for po  select  the  PO number  and copy it.

step 2 

Go to se16n  T-CODE  then write a table name EKET (Scheduling Agreement Schedule Lines)  now just paste the po number that u have selected and you will get the report PO doc and PR Doc Number  with line Items

entry.title: Re: Error Encountered During Status change for Standard C...
entry.content: The best practice on community is for the OP to be the one who marks an answer as accepted. This ensures that the solution truly addresses the issue they faced. If the OP does not return to accept an answer, the "Product and Topic Expert" of SAP helps to judge and mark answer as solution. The OP can unaccept the answer anytime and ask further help from the community. This makes sense to me.

entry.title: Re: Datasphereで標準CDS Viewがインポートできない事象
entry.content:
rio_takemasa さん
DSPで表示されるのはSQL View名でI_GLACCOUNTから始まる名称はDDL Source名です。
 RSODPABAPCDSVIEWというS/4HANAのテーブルで読み替えが可能です。

SQL View名(上記テーブルのフィールドではObject Nameの名称)でDSP取込は可能かと思います。
こちらで目的とするCDSが取り込みできるか見てみてください。

sakamoto.ko

entry.title: Is there any workaround for flowing the Documents/attachments from Recruiting RCM to Employee Profil
Preventive Maintenance assistance for SAP PM and SAP EAM using IBM watsonx
entry.content:
Introduction

In today's fast-paced production industry, unscheduled downtime and equipment breakdowns can cause major operational interruptions and financial losses. To overcome this, businesses are increasingly resorting to proactive techniques that use cutting-edge technology to efficiently manage their assets. One such method is to integrate AI-driven solutions into current corporate systems.

 This article explores how combining Watsonx.ai with SAP's Plant Maintenance (PM) Module and Asset Management Platform can help create a virtual assistant for preventive maintenance. The technology aims to automate asset monitoring, identify potential breakdowns, and schedule timely interventions, ensuring continuous production while reducing unexpected maintenance costs.

 

Architecture

In this architecture, we have SAP S/4HANA at the core, which integrates SAP Plant Maintenance (PM) and SAP Enterprise Asset Management (EAM). These modules handle the maintenance and asset lifecycle management processes within the system. The data exchange between SAP S/4HANA and the front-end interface happens through SAP OData services, which efficiently transfer data to and from a SAP UI5 application—in this case, a Preventive Maintenance Application.

This SAP UI5 Preventive Maintenance Application is enhanced with a conversational layer powered by Watsonx Assistant, allowing users to interactively query and retrieve real-time details about plant operations and asset conditions. Watsonx Assistant is built upon Watsonx.ai, an AI platform capable of processing both structured and unstructured data to provide insights and recommendations related to the maintenance and management of critical assets.

Additionally, SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) serves as a critical integration hub in this architecture. It connects various SAP services and applications, enabling seamless data flow between systems. SAP BTP also incorporates SAP Gen AI Hub service, which can extend the capabilities of the system by integrating with external AI platforms, such as IBM Cloud, which hosts watsonx.ai.

One of the key features of this architecture is its versatility in data sourcing. While SAP HANA serves as the primary database for SAP applications, watsonx assistant can also interface with non-SAP databases, enabling the system to collect, analyse, and utilize data from a variety of sources. This opens the door for more comprehensive insights by merging data from disparate systems, enhancing the overall predictive maintenance capabilities of the virtual assistant. 

 

 Value Proposition 

  • Comprehensive Maintenance Schedules 
    • Time-based Maintenance: Ensures that equipment is maintained on a regular basis at predetermined intervals, lowering the chance of unexpected malfunctions. These schedules may be automated using Watsonx Assistant, which improves adherence to maintenance timeframes while eliminating manual involvement. 
    • Performance-based maintenance: It helps monitors asset performance parameters and initiates maintenance actions when equipment performance begins to depart from ideal circumstances. Integration with WatsonX Assistant allows for predictive insights and faster response to performance deterioration. 
    • Condition-based repair: Monitors real-time equipment conditions using IoT data, allowing for repair when certain thresholds or abnormalities are discovered. The Watsonx assistant may use this information to automate maintenance triggers and maximise asset uptime.  

  • Seamless IoT Integration for Automated Inspections
    • By interacting with an IoT Hub, Watsonx Assistant automates inspection operations by gathering real-time data from equipment sensors. This eliminates manual inspections, decreases the possibility of human mistake, and assures that equipment always operates within set safety and operational limitations.
    • Automated warnings and suggestions based on IoT data can motivate preventive maintenance choices, hence increasing overall operational efficiency.  

  • Streamlined SAP Workflow Management: 
    • Watsonx Assistant improves the administration of important SAP activities including generating, maintaining, and presenting equipment and functional locations. It streamlines the processing of asset information and maintenance records, minimising administrative bottlenecks. 
    • Simplifies the process of maintaining maintenance task lists, allowing plant managers to easily prioritise, allocate, and carry out maintenance tasks. 
    • Allows for the approval and release of maintenance orders via a conversational interface, which speeds up decision-making and reduces delays caused by human participation. 

  • Boosting Operational Efficiency: 
    • Automating procedures and using intelligent maintenance schedules enhances asset availability, uptime, and lowers operating costs. 
    • Watsonx Assistant's integration with SAP enables seamless communication across teams, enhancing collaboration and real-time decision-making.    

Business Outcome:  

  • Increased Operational Efficiency: With the integration of watsonx assistant into SAP’s preventive maintenance, businesses can automate maintenance scheduling and task execution. This reduces the manual workload, optimizes resource allocation, and streamlines maintenance operations. By ensuring equipment is serviced based on real-time data and performance metrics, operations run smoothly without unnecessary interruptions, boosting overall productivity. 
  • Reduced Downtime Costs: By leveraging real-time insights from IoT sensors and predictive maintenance capabilities, watsonx assistant helps prevent unplanned equipment failures. This proactive approach minimizes unexpected downtime, ensuring continuous production and reducing the significant costs associated with halting operations for emergency repairs.  
  • Extended Equipment Lifespan: Regular, condition-based, and performance-based maintenance prolongs the life of critical machinery. By addressing wear and tear before it escalates into serious damage, businesses can avoid costly replacements or overhauls, maximizing the return on investment in their equipment assets. 
  • Improved Safety and Compliance: Automating inspections and maintenance ensures that equipment consistently operates within safety standards and regulatory requirements. watsonx assistant can help ensure that safety protocols are followed, alerting teams when maintenance is overdue or when equipment is performing outside acceptable parameters, reducing the risk of accidents or compliance violations. 
  • Enhanced Customer Satisfaction: Consistent operational efficiency and reduced downtime lead to fewer disruptions in service or product delivery. watsonx assistant’s role in optimizing maintenance ensures that customers receive reliable, timely products and services, leading to higher customer satisfaction and stronger business relationships.

Business Features 

  • Enhanced and Quick Assistance for Asset Troubleshooting: watsonx assistant provides real-time troubleshooting support for operators and maintenance teams. By leveraging AI-driven insights, it quickly identifies potential asset issues, suggests solutions, and provides step-by-step guidance. This reduces troubleshooting time and helps resolve problems before they escalate, minimizing the impact on production. 
  • Automated Analysis of Inspection and Maintenance Activity with Detailed Report Generation: The assistant automates the analysis of inspection data and maintenance logs, generating comprehensive reports without manual input. This feature ensures that maintenance activities are tracked, and detailed summaries of inspections are created, giving managers clear insights into equipment health, compliance, and performance.   
  • User-Friendly Conversational Flow for Operator and Supervisor Persona: With an intuitive conversational interface, watsonx assistant tailors interactions for different user personas like operators and supervisors. It simplifies complex maintenance tasks, offering guidance in an easy-to-understand language, making the entire process more efficient and accessible for all users involved in equipment management. 
  •  Limitless Data Insights and Exploration Capability: watsonx assistant provides powerful analytics and exploration tools for maintenance data. Users can dive deep into equipment performance, historical maintenance records, and predictive insights, enabling informed decision-making and the discovery of hidden patterns or trends that can enhance preventive maintenance strategies. 
  • Ability to Understand Natural Language Queries and Retrieve Precise Answers: Equipped with natural language processing (NLP), watsonx assistant can understand user queries in everyday language. Whether an operator asks for specific equipment information, upcoming maintenance tasks, or troubleshooting advice, the assistant delivers precise answers instantly, reducing the need to sift through complex data manually.  

Conclusion 
Integrating Watsonx Assistant into preventive maintenance operations introduces an AI-driven approach to asset management. It enhances troubleshooting, automates analysis, and provides comprehensive data, helping businesses maintain operational efficiency and minimize downtime. The conversational interface supports both operators and supervisors, streamlining maintenance processes and integrating with SAP systems. Watsonx Assistant enables teams to make informed decisions by analysing maintenance data using natural language processing and data insights. This integration aims to extend equipment lifespan, improve safety, and enhance compliance within maintenance activities, making it a practical addition to asset management strategies. 

Credits: 
Dhara Bagadia 
Tushar Trivedi

entry.title: Re: TMS - Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CI/CPI) Content with Transport Management Service (TMS) a
entry.content:
This step 9 seems to be wrong as per my understing : 

Step 9: Create Destination Pointing to TMS Service (CAS subaccount)
In SAP BTP Cockpit of the subaccount with TMS provisioned, choose Connectivity -> Destinations -> New Destination.

Correction, As per logic - TransportManagementService (BTP) destination should be present in Source Subaccount. 

If you use SAP Cloud Transport Management service to start the transport directly in your application, a destination to SAP Cloud Transport Management service is required in the source (development) environment of your application.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE - Delete Schedule Line
entry.content:
I got same requirement to delete /update/insert schedule line using bpi 

There is no scope to delete the Schedule line item using BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE. Just pass the schedule_linesx-updkz  = 'U' for update or delete. then write the code MV45AFZZ  inside form FORM userexit_save_document_prepare . First get the old values from VBEP based on XVBEP[] and move the YVBEP[].  Update the UPDKZ flag 'D' for schedule line item for both XVBEP[] and YVBEP[]. for any change or insert update only XVBEP[]. for delete line we have to update both XVBEP[] and YVBEP[].    Last pass the UPD_VBEP = 'U' for capture change log.
